name: Knowledge is Power
description: Nilu used his Ringdrake's sensors to analyze the approaching Mechabeast. He gasped when he realized what they were facing. "That big crab is like a giant bomb! Stay away from it and don't let it cross the defense lines!"
effect: Choose one Enemy. You learn that Enemy's Attributes, Upgrades, Weapons and Genre Powers.

name: Live Another Day
description: Her cockpit flashed red, once again. Tch. She couldn't afford to let the enemy get ahold of her Gear, but neither could they just rebuild her Sworddrake from entirely if she set it to self-destruct. "I'm pulling back, cover me!" Kendra picked up the enemy's energy cannon and used it along with her boosters to get herself out of the battlefield. When you're the only frontliner, it's not a matter of "if" you'll have to bail but "when".
effect: You automatically retreat from the battlefield. This prevents any Damage that would have been dealt to you if used as a response to an attack.

name: Mid-Scene Upgrade
description: It wasn't ready, they said. Her Gear had only launched to keep it away from the enemy's hands and Charlotte was told to retreat instead of using the prototype weaponry and potentially losing the Gear. She knew better, that it was not just her best option at the time, but possibly her only one. Charlie lifted the restrictions on her Firedrake's twin shoulder cannons and launched two violent energy pillars at the enemy. Both enemy mechs melted down... Same as the cannons themselves.
effect: Gain a new Upgrade or Weapon, you must pay its MP Cost at the earliest opportunity after the Operation ends. If you would not be able to make the purchase in the future, for whichever reason, the GM may rule that you cannot gain that Upgrade or Weapon. You may use this Power once per Episode Arc and must pay for what you bought at the earliest possible opportunity, saving up for it if necessary.

name: Not so Fast
description: Missiles approached the Swordrake from behind, its back exposed. Akihiko promptly aimed his Gundrake's head vulcans and shot them down without her ever noticing his help. Him and Kendra would bicker about whether she was overextending again or not later, but for now he was going to do his job of watching her back.
effect: Force an Enemy's Might Test against an Ally of yours to be rerolled inflicting it with two Disadvantages and keeping the new result. This may not be used on Tests that attack you, even if you are just one of multiple targets. You can use this Power once per Test.

name: Synchro Attack
description: The enemy was big, but slow. Charlotte knew exactly how to handle them. "Alright you three, we're going with the Tetra-Formation!" The team all answered in accord. "Roger, Captain." "Gotcha, Charlie!" "Let's kick its ass!" Four Gears surrounded the titanic crystal slug monster, two bombarding it with munitions and energy to pin it down, allowing the third to stab it with their giant sword where the fourth's systems indicated it was most vulnerable.
effect: Choose at least one willing Ally to make a combination attack with, you gain two Advantages to your next Offensive Action for each Ally that helps you out this way. This uses up an Action and a Genre Point from every other participant. Your participating Allies skip their next Actions. Units may participate in one Synchro Attack per Operation.

name: Try Again
description: Kendra's giant sword missed its mark, the enemy Machina simply stepping back to avoid it and moving in to punish her mistake with its radiant fist. That's when the thrusters in the back of the Swordrake kicked in to make Kendra's Gear continue spinning, the added momentum from the apparent miss increasing the force with which the huge slab of metal would slam into the enemy. They always fell for that trick.
effect: Reroll one of your Might Tests gaining an Advantage to it, keeping the new result. You can use this Power once per Test.

name: Fight Smarter
description: Marie adjusted her non-prescription glasses. No one could see her within her own cockpit, but it helped her get in The Zone. And getting herself in The Zone helped her own Mechabeast's performance. "'Kay Celly, I need you to lock on to this zippy unhittable guy with your third eye so I can shoot him down. On the count of three, two, one... Ka-blam~!" The shot was a bullseye. As the enemy came down crashing, she quipped. "See? A little pep talk, and a lot of highly advanced Extra-Sensory-Perception, can make great achievements."
effect: One Enemy Tests Systems against a DN of 5 plus your Systems. If they fail you gain the benefit of the Aim Action and your Weapon gains the Crippling ability for their next Offensive Action against that Enemy. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: I Don't Think so
description: Hal's Skydrake maneuvered zigged and zagged between the enemy formation, launching missiles as he went. A yellow window popped up to warn him of incoming flak and he transformed his Gear from plane to humanoid mode just in time to block it with the giant robot's shield. That was close.
effect: Force an Enemy's Might Test against you to be rerolled inflicting it with one Disadvantage, keeping the new result. You can use this Power once per Test.

name: It's Over!
description: Rock chewed through his shotgun ammo while burning holes into the Sweeper-Class Machina. But just to be safe, he jammed the firearm inside the enemy's giant dome-like body and kept pulling the trigger until he was entirely out of shells.
effect: Whenever you deal damage to an Enemy and they survive with 5 or less points of Threshold left, you may activate this Power to deal that Enemy their remaining amount of Threshold in Damage.

name: Parting Shot
description: Ashoka was never one to take a loss gracefully. He could've pulled back, but instead chose to accept being stabbed dangerously close to the cockpit just to grab the enemy by the arm and empty his shoulder missiles at point blank range. This way, they were both down for the count.
effect: Whenever you would be defeated you may activate this Power to take an Offensive Action against that Enemy. Your Action takes place at the same theirs does and you are still taken out after your final attack.

name: The Strong Adapt
description: Rock knew he wasn't going to be able to chase down to the fleeing enemy on his own. "I need a Cloudrider!" He called out. In response the battleship launched a flying mobile platform to help Rock fly over the terrain and catch up to his target.
effect: Choose one Feature when activating this Power and gain that Feature for three Rounds (counting this one). You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: This is For My Friend!
description: Soran's Windrake was the last one standing. Everything depended on her. If she couldn't pull this off, many would die and even more would lose their homes to the enemy. She steeled her conviction. "I am... Windrake!" Its G-Reactor running at triple the energy output, the Windrake glowed red as it proceeded to utterly annihilate the enemy with a relentless sequence of blows. By the time the Gear powered down, unable to move anymore, its target was a mere pile of scrap. But Soran didn't know that, she'd long passed out from allowing the Windrake to draw from her life energy to power its stunt, her body moving on its own. All she'd remember was seeing red and losing consciousness.
effect: You gain two Advantages to your next Might Test this Turn. You can use this Power only after one Ally of equal Power Level to you has been defeated during this Operation, and you may reuse it once for every Ally defeated.

name: My Defense is Impregnable
description: Reina stood her ground against the beam saber strikes of the enemy Executioner-class Machina, pushing against them with her Crustamens' Psychic Shell to make sure it couldn't attack anyone but her. She wondered, sometimes, if she might've been a turtle in a past life. Probably not, she figured, turtles weren't this proactive with their shells.
effect: Halve the next instance of Damage you would take. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: My Style is Impetuous
description: Kendra leaped into the air, drawing the large sword on her back and yelled out the world's longest battlecry as she descended upon the enemy Mechabeast. It died, as things impaled with swords tend to do. There was a moment of silence before someone else spoke. "Can you at least please switch off team communication before you do that?" Whined Akihiko, the nerd. Kendra laughed it off. "It's to share my fighting spirit with you all."
effect: Treat Tension as if it were 4 points higher for your next Offensive Action. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Signature Weapon
description: Soran readied up her Windrake's primary weapon—the Bahamut lance. She had the Gear calculate the optimum trajectory path against her target and followed it as best she could while gradually increasing the acceleration of her boosters to maximize the effectiveness of her jousting attack. She made the strategy of constantly charging at enemies look easy and brainless, but it was a very precise and technical strategy.
effect: Choose any one of your Weapons when you take this Power. Activate Signature Weapon to make your next Offensive Action using the chosen Weapon immune to the effects of Active Defenses and increase the result of its Might Test by 5. You can use this Power once per Operation, but if you have multiple Signature Weapons each can be used once.

name: Believe in Myself
description: The Flamer Drone had snuck up on Nilu and scorched one of his Gear's arms. But this was nothing he couldn't handle. Nilu turned the Ringdrake's repair nanomachines on its damaged arm and prepared his counterattack. "Alright, I'm all fixed up, and now... AAAAAAA" He promptly turned tail and ran away. His Gear was an unarmed support model, after all.
effect: Restore 5 points to your Threshold and treat all Maimed Areas as normal for three Rounds (counting this one). You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: I Cannot be Defeated
description: The blast had been big enough that the shockwave would be felt for kilometers. Nothing could walk out of that intact. And yet, a humanoid figure walked out of the flames. Ashoka's Myrmitherion was missing an arm and half its head, but the Absolute Barrier had somehow stopped the worst of the explosion. "I am indomitable, inevitable... An immovable object and unstoppable force all in one!" And then his Mechabeast charged at the enemy once more. He still had plenty of fight left in him.
effect: The next time that you would be destroyed during this Operation, you remain functional with a Threshold of 1 instead. You can use this Power once per Round and against any source of Damage except Techniques.

name: I'm Breaking Through
description: Akihiko's pellets plinked ineffectually against the Executioner-class Machina's forcefield. Annoyed, he pulled back from the duel while he switched his rifle's ammunition to barrier-piercing rounds. Just as the enemy was about to catch up to him, the reloader was done and he promptly shot the enemy's arm off.
effect: Your current Offensive Action is immune to the effects of Active Defenses.

name: Come at Me Bro
description: Reina stood in front of the mind worm hordes and instructed her Mechabeast to signal them with waves that would get their attention. Whatever it was the creature projected at them, the monsters were so aggravated they turned away from whatever it was they were looking at and all charged straight at her.
effect: Until the end of your next Turn, if an Enemy within 5 Zones from you makes an Offensive Test against another Ally, you may Attack that individual Enemy once after their own Action has finished and automatically get a result of 10 to the Might Test. If an Ally uses this Power while your own is active, the effects of their Power replace yours. This Power has no effect while you are Docked onto another Unit.

name: Gotta go Fast
description: Akihiko could not help but lecture everyone on a public frequency as he continued to wear the enemy down. "A sufficient mobility advantage lets you dictate terms of engagement. Mobility, thus, serves double duty as a facilitator of offense as well as a method of defense." This was his fancy way of saying that hit-and-run tactics were effective against foes slow and low on ranged options.
effect: You or an Ally may Move an additional 5 Zones with their next Action this Round. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: My Pain is your Pain
description: A hail of bullets came in the Gundrake's direction. With the poise of an ancient glacier, Akihiko simply called out the voice command for the defensive system designed for these circumstances. "Reflecting Barrier." Some projectiles came through and dented his armor, but the rest returned to their owner, shredding them to pieces.
effect: The next time an Enemy would deal Damage to you this Round, you deal half that much Damage back to them. The Damage dealt by this Power happens after the Enemy resolves the Damage against you. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Take One for the Team
description: Reina pushed Shin out of the way of the incoming laser beam. The attack would punch through her shields and burn down her partner Mechabeast's torso. The heat felt like she was being boiled alive, but she endured nonetheless. She promised she would protect him.
effect: You may have the next instance of Damage that would be dealt to an Ally within a number of Zones equal to or lower than your Speed be dealt to you in their place instead. After that, all Offensive Actions made against the chosen Ally suffer a Disadvantage to their Might Tests until the beginning of your next Turn.

name: The Tacticool Approach
description: Marie's Megacephalus stood still. She knew there was no point trying to dodge or block railgun fire from over the horizon, so she waited for her partner's enhanced senses to detect it. When it finally came, the duo stepped aside and the projectile breezed past where Megacephalus' head was a moment ago. "Good girl, Celly~ You're getting extra treats tonight!"
effect: If your Systems is higher than your Might or your Guard, you may replace one or both with your Systems until the beginning of your next Turn.

name: Trump Card
description: Marie preferred to provide support from the back, using Megacephalus' psychic powers to play interference against enemies rather than to fight directly. But if she and her Mechabeast were forced to do so, they had a fallback plan ready. "Celly, activate Direct Combat Mode. Enable the Stumbling Fists Subroutine and draw the Electrosappers. I'm gonna teach this jerk not to mess with us."
effect: Choose any two Weapons you don't already own. You gain the chosen Weapons until end of Operation and they cannot be Maimed by Enemy Attacks. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Can't let you do That
description: Hal kept circling around the enemy artillery, waiting for the time while peppering them with missiles. When they finally decided to turn away from firing at his team to fire at him, he shot a multitude of chaff dispensers to null the effectiveness of their missiles. Just as planned.
effect: Any one Enemy loses the benefit of Tension to their Might Tests until the beginning of your next Turn. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Don't Give Up
description: Everything was going to hell in a bullet train. Not that she'd ever seen a bullet train, but they were mentioned in history books. Desperate to motivate the only one who could possibly stand up to the giant moth about to destroy them, Marie yelled out. "Get in there, Shin! The princess needs you now more than ever, so rise to the challenge and become a legend, young man!"
effect: Restore your Threshold or that of an Ally by an amount equal to your Systems. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Mind Over Matter
description: The giant plant ID'ed as "Hydra" had all the team's Gears grasped in its tentacle-like vines. Unfortunately for the Mechabeast, this was a poor matchup for it. Rock's Explodrake simply fired some of his many integrated explosive launchers, no hands necessary, and hastily freed his entire team as the beast recoiled back in pain.
effect: You and all Allies within 5 Zones treat halved Attributes as normal until the beginning of your next Turn. Mind over Matter will also stop effects that halve your available Energy, even if the base Attribute itself remains untouched.

name: This is my Battlefield
description: Charlotte needed to do more than destroy the mind worms coming at them, she had to halt the advance of the ones behind them too. "I'm using my cannons on the cliffside at 9 o'clock to stop the enemy advance. Steer clear of it." Some mental calculations and careful aiming later, her Firedrake's Double Blaster punched holes into the mountain and caused a landslide. The enemies would not be coming through this narrow cliffside anymore.
effect: Choose one type of Terrain (other than Plain) and turn a Blast (1) area of Zones into that type of Terrain until the end of your next Turn. If you create Impassable Terrain below other Units, they will get pushed out of the way in a direction of your choice. You can use this Power once per Turn.

name: You are Going Down
description: After enough poking and probing at their defenses, Hal figured out the Expurgator-class Machina's weakness. "I've got it. Their plating is weakest in the joints connecting the top and bottom halves. Everyone aim for the abdomen!"
effect: Choose one Enemy. All attacks against that Enemy from Units within 5 Zones of you gain an Advantage to their Might Tests until the beginning of your next Turn. This includes your own attacks. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: You can do Better than That
description: "Aki, I am sending you targeting data!" said Nilu. "No need, I'm more comfortable using my own." "Nuh-huh, who has the most advanced targeting systems in this lineup? Besides, it's already tuned for your motion and weapon preferences." "...Fair enough."
effect: You turn a failed Might Test of yours or an Ally into an automatic success, using the current Tension as the amount it bypassed the target's Defense. This ignores Advantages and Disadvantages entirely, but not modifiers to Tension. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Hang in There!
description: Soran could hear Tiana's voice, faintly in the darkness. She was calling out to her. "Soran, come in! Answer me, Soran!" her comrade kept going on and on. It was a good thing she did, otherwise Soran might not have woken up again. Grasping the controls and reaching for the hand of Tiana's gear with her own's, they together shake the mind worms off Soran's Windrake. "Thanks, Tiana."
effect: You or another Pilot that is about to be defeated through Plot Armor Damage (or was already defeated) restores their Plot Armor to full and continues fighting normally. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: I am a Loose Cannon
description: "Myrmitherion, engage Super Soldier Mode. We're going all-out from the start this time." Ashoka's Mechabeast let out a guttural bellow and injected itself with a massive amount of stimulants so powerful even the pilot felt their effects. They were now in a perfect Flow state and would fight in complete synchronization with each other.
effect: Roll 1d10 when you activate this Power. You suffer that much Damage at the end of your Turn, but until your next Turn you treat Tension as if it were half that many points higher (rounding up). You can use this Power once per Round.

name: I am your Opponent
description: Alpha Max's Gilgangar beelined directly for Charlotte, sword drawn, but Kendra jumped in front of him and pushed him back with her own blade. "Where are you going, you bastard? I'll be your dance partner this evening." Alpha Max laughed. "Good, I like my prey with some fighting spirit. Now put your sword where your mouth is and entertain me!"
effect: When an Ally of yours is being attacked in a Duel and within a Range equal to your Speed or less, you can use this Power to Move into that Zone and redirect the attack to yourself. Your Ally Disengages from the Duel, but is shifted 1 Zone in a direction of their choice, and you are now Dueling that Enemy. You can Disengage from a Duel this way.

name: Stake my Life on it
description: Shin grabbed the enemy with his Polyspina, trapping it in a lethal bear hug. Afterwards, he purged the Familiar's extra armor and jumped away to activate the armor pack's self-destruct function. If he'd remembered to turn around, he'd have looked really cool with the explosion behind him.
effect: You self-destruct your current Level of Threshold and increase the result of your current Might Test by the amount of Threshold points lost this way. That Offensive action is also immune to the effect of Active Defenses. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Take Cover!
description: Ashoka didn't like to be protected, but Reina jumped in front of the building-melting beam anyway. She projected her barrier and what would've ordinarily vaporized one or more limbs from Ashoka's Mechabeast merely singed the skin of both of them. "I didn't need the help... But thanks anyway."
effect: An Enemy's Might Test using a Weapon that attacks multiple targets loses the benefit of Tension and you halve all the Damage that would come from that Offensive Action to you or your Allies. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: You are Already Dead
description: Shin's berserking Mechabeast leaped on top of the monster, clawing at its exposed flesh, stabbing with its tail and goring it with its large horns. The enemy shook him off, but the damage was already done—it bled out and collapsed shortly afterwards.
effect: Choose one Enemy you have already dealt Damage to during this Operation. That Enemy is dealt an amount of Damage equal to your Might. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Go, Funnels!
description: Tiana coordinated her Subdrake to attack simultaneously with her Psychodrake, pummeling the enemy from two angles at the same time with her Twin Dragon Strike. Only an experienced telekineticist could pull that off.
effect: You can take a second Offensive Action this Turn to use a Remote Weapon. Your Remotes can Move as part of this Action as normal. You can use this Power once per Round and it spends your next Turn's Action in advance.

name: Lightspeed Assault
description: Soran turned her G-Reactor output to 120%. His Windrake charged at the enemy formation, becoming a streak of light, flashing through the enemy Gears, pieces of them being neatly chopped off as if by a gust of razor-sharp wind. On the other side of the battlefield, the Windrake reappeared, fuming off its exhaust ports. "This is the power of Windrake."
effect: Move a number of Zones equal to your Speed, ignoring Enemies and Terrain (even impassable terrain) on the way. Each Enemy whose Zone you cross this way suffers an amount of Damage equal to the current Tension. You may go back and forth when using this Power, hitting the same Enemy multiple times while doing so, but repeat hits do half Damage. This Power spends your Action this Turn in advance. The Action you take with Lightspeed Assault is a Utility Action. This lets you escape from Duels without having to Disengage. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: Twin Strike
description: Shin doesn't use the Polyspina's ranged options often, but it does have the ability to launch its eponymous spines as projectiles. It works especially well when he follows it up by ripping and tearing with the Mechabeast's claws.
effect: Choose two Weapons when you take this Power. You can make two Attack Actions this Turn against the same target with both Weapons, using one first and then the other with your second Action. This second Attack does not get to Move as part of the Action. You can use this Power once per Round and it spends your next Turn's Action in advance.

name: I'll Patch You Up.
description: The Gilgangar had just cut down Kendra's Swordrake and forced her to eject. This was bad. Very bad. Aki was down and Charlie's Firedrake was in poor shape too. "Charlie, can you hold him down if I supercharge you?" "I'll do you one better, kid. I'll take him down if you can keep me functional." Her confidence reassuring him, he restored Charlie's gear back to fighting condition. His small support bot likes having a big and powerful one to stay behind.
effect: The next time you use your Jury Rig Upgrade this Turn, it spends two Restorations but restores twice the amount of Energy spent on it. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: My Last Stand
description: The Polyspina kept walking forward, regrowing and regenerating its damaged body parts as enemies kept shooting it with machineguns, rockets and beam weapons. Meanwhile, his team repositioned themselves to surround the enemy. It's only because Shin is an empathic and mild-mannered person that his dangerous Mechabeast type can stay calm under such tremendous pressure.
effect: The next time you use your Regenerative Upgrade this Turn, you double the amount of Threshold restored with it. You also ignore the effects of Maiming and treat halved Attributes as normal until the beginning of your next Turn. My Last Stand will also stop effects that halve your available Energy, even if the base Attribute itself remains untouched. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: Who the Hell do you Think I am?
description: Sonji combined his support plane unit with Soran's Gear. He immediately began to micromanage the unit's systems as its copilot. No words were shared between the two of them, they were beyond that. Soran simply kept fighting, her friend taking care of everything but pure movement and weapons control for her.
effect: The next time you use your G-Charger Upgrade, you restore your Threshold by 5 and will get the extra 5 points of Energy during your next Turn again without having to use the G-Charger first. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: Chain Explosion
description: Her engineering knowledge allows Tiana to know when and where to strike Gears to make them explode the most spectacularly. So she did, shooting at the enemy where their reactor is located precisely the moment they were gearing up to fire their own weapon. It's a good thing they're fighting in a barren wasteland, or this would get her chewed out later.
effect: When an Enemy is destroyed you may use this Power and spend any amount of Energy. The Enemy explodes in a Blast (4), dealing an amount of Damage equal to the current Tension plus the amount of Energy spent this way. You can use this Power once per Enemy.

name: Shoot it Down
description: While Charlotte attacked with her large shoulder cannons from a distance, she had her rifle aimed at the enemy. When the return fire finally came, she used the singularity projector on the incoming projectiles to divert their courses. Only an ace like her would be capable of coordinating multiple tasks with such precision.
effect: Spend any amount of Energy in response to the result of a Might Test. The Might Test is rerolled, with a number of Disadvantages equal to the amount of Energy spent. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: I Have Control
description: Clickity-clack go Tiana's fingers on the keyboard, her electronic warfare causing the enemy Cannon-class drone to reboot. When they came back online, the drone's G-Reactor was attuned to her Synchronizer and the unit solidly under their control. "I have the Cannon-class under my command."
effect: Choose an Enemy Grunt and spend an amount of Energy equal to their Power Level plus the current Tension. You gain control of that Grunt's Actions during their Turn, though you may not have them eject or self-destruct. At the beginning of every one of your next Turns you may spend the same amount of Energy again to maintain control over that Grunt. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: I Am Helping!
description: "It's okay, guys, I've got this." "NO ROCK, DON'T-" *Boom*. "...Don't worry, Hal. It's just a small campfire. This is fine." Rock had his heart in the right place. He'd just never really understood that his Explodrake wasn't really meant for defensive fire. You'd think the name would make it obvious, yet here we are.
effect: You inflict a bonus Disadvantage when using the Suppress Action this Turn. If the Tension bonus for the Might Test is 5 or higher, you turn the Zone under the target into Extreme Terrain until the beginning of your next Turn. You can use this Power once per Round.

name: Jinxed!
description: As the Flamer-class drone opened its mouth to spew fire, the Skydrake activated its Graviton Gun with perfect timing to make the mobile weapon destroy itself.
effect: One Enemy Weapon gains the Overheating ability if it is a Beam or the Unreliable ability otherwise for this attack. If the Weapon already has one of these abilities, it will gain the other one as well. If the Tension bonus for the Might Test is 5 or higher, either ability will also trigger with an even result, as if it were an odd number. You can use this Power once per Operation.

name: Pierce the Heavens
description: Ashoka and his Myrmitherion Mechabeast fought like in a trance, moving with flexibility and grace like a dancer in tune with a silent song of war. This is why anyone with intel on his unit knows the key is to not let him enter that state.
effect: Your next Offensive Action this Turn gains an Advantage to its Might Test. If the Tension bonus of the Might Test is 5 or higher, it also ignores the effects of Active Defenses. You may use this Power once per Round.
